title: The Galloping Ghost
writer: Helmer Walton Bergman, Ford Beebe, Wyndham Gittens
actors: Harold 'Red' Grange, Dorothy Gulliver, Walter Miller
plot: A gambling ring run out of the Mogul Taxi company is intent on fixing college football games. Football star Harold "Red" Grange is a target for the gamblers, whose thugs try to eliminate Grange from playing. Grange's buddy Buddy i...
